billing.pageIntro: View token usage, subscription plans, and pay-as-you-go packs. Subscribe or buy packs when trial credits run out.
billing.quotaSubtitle: For AI product titles and descriptions. Upgrade or buy packs below when you need more.
billing.planBenefitsFootnote: Packs never expire · Subscription refreshes each period
billing.choosePlanSubtitle: Upgrade anytime. Monthly or annual billing, checkout secured by Shopify.
billing.trustCheckout: Subscriptions and packs are billed through Shopify in your store currency.
billing.sectionPacksHint: Purchased tokens never expire and stack with your subscription balance.
billing.lowBalanceWarning: Insufficient tokens. Please subscribe or purchase a token pack on the plans page.
billing.planBenefits: Packs never expire · Subscription refreshes each period · Buy extra packs anytime
billing.choosePlanTitle: Choose the plan that fits you
billing.subscriptionTrialBanner: You are on a Shopify free trial for {{plan}} ({{price}}{{period}}). Trial ends {{date}}; billing starts after the trial unless you cancel.
billing.accountDetailPageSubtitle: Subscription status, credit usage, and billing history.
billing.faqBillingAnswer: Subscriptions are billed through Shopify Billing in your store currency. Annual plans are charged upfront for the year.
billing.faqPackAnswer: No. Purchased tokens never expire and stack with your subscription balance.
billing.faqWhenAnswer: Subscription credits refresh at the start of each billing period. Trial credits are valid during the trial.
billing.faqRefundAnswer: Subscriptions and packs follow Shopify app billing policies. Contact support if you need help.

chat.initialAssistantMessage:
Hello, I am AI Assistant.

I currently support:
1. Store performance analysis and diagnostic suggestions
2. Ads and logistics authorization guidance
3. Operation copywriting and promotion suggestions
4. Common business Q&A
5. Picture translation (upload images and translate text in them)
6. Product copy (provide product ID for tool-based generation, or click the quick prompt and fill in the card, or open the Product copy page)

You can:
• Click the top "Picture translation" quick action to create a translation task
• Use multi-language auto detection
• Keep the original image layout

Tell me your goal directly.
chat.intro: Ask directly for store insights, ads/logistics authorization guidance, and operation suggestions.
chat.tipSingleQuestion: Ask one question at a time for better accuracy.
chat.tipScenario: Describe your scenario directly, such as customer acquisition or repeat purchase growth.
chat.tipAction: When you need actions, include clear goals and constraints.
chat.tipNewChat: The model keeps this page conversation context. Click New chat to reset.
chat.sendFailed: Send failed. Please try again later.
chat.requestFailed: Request failed ({{status}}). Please try again later.
chat.invalidReply: No valid response received. Please retry.
chat.assistantOpenGenerateCard: I have opened the product copy form. Please search and select a product (or manually enter product ID in Advanced), choose the target language, and the system will generate title and description from Shopify product data.
chat.assistantOpenTranslationCard: The translation task card is open. Fill in the target language, item limit per module, and select modules (products, collections, pages, articles, etc.), then submit to start the translation task.
chat.assistantOpenPictureTranslateCard: Picture translation card is open. Upload an image or paste an image URL, choose languages, then submit.
chat.translationSubmittedWithId: Translation task submitted (Task ID: {{jobId}}). Please go to Translation tasks page to check JSON Runtime progress.
chat.translationSubmitted: Translation task submitted. Please go to Translation tasks page to check progress.
chat.pictureTranslateCompleted:
Picture translation completed.

Translated image below 👇

imageStudio.pageSubtitle: Generate product images or translate picture text on one page; history is saved together
imageStudio.historyHint: Generation and translation history merged by time; click to switch tab and preview
imageStudio.historyEmpty: No activity yet — generate or translate to see items here
imageStudio.tasksPageSubtitle: Manage image generation and picture translation tasks on one page
imageStudio.confirmGenerateDescription: A background task will be created. Track progress in the task list.
imageStudio.confirmTranslateDescription: A background task will be created. Track progress in the task list.
imageStudio.uploadNotSupportedYet: Return to the Translate tab to upload or select an image before creating a task.
imageStudio.historyTasksHint: History includes tasks created more than 24 hours ago.
imageStudio.currentTasksEmpty: No tasks yet. Create one from Generate or Translate first.
imageStudio.imageGenerationDetailSummary: Review scene description, prompt, and generated image. Continue optimizing from the result.
imageStudio.pictureTranslateDetailSummary: Review original and translated images. Translate again with a new target language.
imageStudio.optimizeDialogDescription: Add optimization notes to create a new image generation task from the current result.
imageStudio.translateOptimizeDialogDescription: Choose a new target language to create a new translation task from the current image.
imageStudio.optimizeCommentPlaceholder: e.g. Keep the composition, improve lighting and natural feel.
imageStudio.optimizeBaseDescriptionMissing: Base description is missing; cannot continue.
imageStudio.optimizeImageSourceMissing: Image source is missing; cannot continue.

pictureTranslate.title: Picture translation
pictureTranslate.subtitle: Upload an image and choose translation languages
pictureTranslate.productEmpty: No matching products found, try another keyword
pictureTranslate.productImageEmpty: No available images for this product
pictureTranslate.validationImageRequired: Please upload an image or input an image URL
pictureTranslate.validationInvalidFileType: Only png, jpg, jpeg images are supported
pictureTranslate.readFileFailed: Failed to read image, please retry
pictureTranslate.pageSubtitle: Translate text in images while preserving original layout
pictureTranslate.pageFootnote: Upload, URL, or product image supported. Volcano or Aidge is chosen automatically by language.
pictureTranslate.empty: Upload an image to start translation
pictureTranslate.historyHint: History persists when you return; click an entry to preview on the right

imageGeneration.pageSubtitle: Describe the scene — AI Assistant will craft a drawing prompt and generate the image
imageGeneration.descriptionHint: Describe the product, setting, and style in plain language — e.g. summer running shoes on grass, bright sunlight, e-commerce hero shot
imageGeneration.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product image you want…
imageGeneration.validationDescriptionMin: Description must be at least 4 characters
imageGeneration.generatingAsync: Generating image in the background. It will appear here when ready; check Recent generations below.
imageGeneration.pollTimeout: Generation is taking longer than expected. Check Recent generations later or retry.
imageGeneration.empty: No image yet — adjust the description and try again
imageGeneration.emptyBeforeSubmit: Enter a scene description, then click Generate image
imageGeneration.historyHint: History persists when you return to this page; click a pending item to keep waiting
imageGeneration.pageFootnote: Images are generated asynchronously and stored in the cloud. Return to this page to view Recent generations; they are not written to Shopify automatically.

generate.intro: Generate product titles and marketing copy from Shopify product data in your current store. Select a product first; target language defaults to store primary language and can be changed from the dropdown.
generate.formCardSubtitle: Select a product and target language, then generate
generate.pageFootnote: Generation uses tokens. Preview and edit title and description on the right before saving to Shopify.
generate.fallbackLocalesHint: Using built-in locale list. Grant read_locales scope and reinstall app to sync enabled Shopify locales.
generate.emptyResult: Please select a product and generate copy.
generate.confirmSaveDesc: Current edited title and description will be written back to this product and overwrite product copy in store.
generate.validationSelectProductId: Please select a product or enter product ID
generate.validationLocalesLoading: Language list is loading. Please wait.
generate.copyFailed: Copy failed. Check browser permission or copy manually.

credentials.suggestionIntro: Enter the feature you want assistant to add.
credentials.suggestionModalHint: Describe the feature you want assistant to support.
credentials.adsAuthDesc: After authorizing ad platforms, AI can analyze channel performance such as ROAS, conversion, and channel contribution.
credentials.logisticsAuthDesc: After authorizing logistics platforms, AI can analyze fulfillment with delivery time, shipment exception, and sign-off metrics.
credentials.oauthPending: {{provider}} {{category}} authorization flow is not connected yet (OAuth)
credentials.sfHint: SF Express usually uses API credentials instead of OAuth redirect authorization. Fill customer code and check word; monthly account is optional.
credentials.fedexHint: FedEx uses API credentials. Fill API Key, Secret Key, and Account Number; Meter Number is optional.
credentials.googleRequireAll: Please complete Google Ads authorization details
credentials.tiktokRequireAll: Please complete TikTok Ads authorization details
credentials.microsoftRequireAll: Please complete Microsoft Ads authorization details
credentials.sfRequireAll: Please provide SF customer code and check word
credentials.fedexRequireAll: Please provide FedEx API Key, Secret Key, and Account Number
credentials.googleSaveFail: Failed to save Google Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.tiktokSaveFail: Failed to save TikTok Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.microsoftSaveFail: Failed to save Microsoft Ads authorization. Try again later.
credentials.sfSaveFail: Failed to save SF Express configuration. Try again later.
credentials.fedexSaveFail: Failed to save FedEx authorization. Try again later.
credentials.suggestionSubmitOk: Submitted successfully. Thanks for your suggestion.
credentials.suggestionSubmitCatch: Failed to submit suggestion. Try again later.
credentials.googleTipClientId: OAuth Client ID: get it from Google Cloud Console OAuth credentials page.
credentials.googleTipClientSecret: OAuth Client Secret: get it from the same credential entry as Client ID.
credentials.googleTipDeveloperToken: Developer Token: apply/view in Google Ads API Center.
credentials.googleTipCustomerId: Customer ID: Google Ads account ID. Numeric format without dashes is recommended.
credentials.tiktokTipAppId: App ID: create app in TikTok for Business developer portal.
credentials.tiktokTipAppSecret: App Secret: from the same app settings page as App ID.
credentials.tiktokTipAdvertiserId: Advertiser ID: check in TikTok Ads advertiser account info page.
credentials.microsoftTipClientId: Client ID: from App registrations in Azure Portal.
credentials.microsoftTipClientSecret: Client Secret: create/get from Certificates & secrets of the same app.
credentials.microsoftTipDeveloperToken: Developer Token: get from Microsoft Advertising portal/API settings.
credentials.microsoftTipCustomerId: Customer ID: Microsoft Advertising account ID.
credentials.sfTipCustomerCode: Customer Code: get from SF open platform/e-waybill API onboarding documents.
credentials.sfTipCheckWord: Check Word: provided by SF open platform with customer code.
credentials.sfTipMonthly: Monthly account: from SF monthly billing account profile (optional).
credentials.sfTipSupport: If values are unclear, contact SF business/technical support for activation parameters.
credentials.fedexTipApiKey: API Key: generated after creating project in FedEx Developer Portal.
credentials.fedexTipSecret: Secret Key: generated on the same page as API Key.
credentials.fedexTipAccount: Account Number: from FedEx account profile.
credentials.fedexTipMeter: Meter Number: from historical FedEx Web Services onboarding data (optional).

dailyOps.pageIntro: Inspects orders, fulfillment, logistics, refunds and inventory every day, turns findings into actionable tasks organized by the urgent / important matrix, and reviews progress against yesterday.
dailyOps.emptyState: No order data yet. New orders sync automatically; run the backfill page to import historical orders first.
dailyOps.quadrantQ1Desc: Directly hurts GMV, customer experience or cost if not handled today
dailyOps.quadrantQ2Desc: Time-sensitive routine work, best handled in batch
dailyOps.quadrantQ3Desc: Affects mid/long-term growth, schedule for this week
dailyOps.quadrantQ4Desc: No clear payoff yet, parked in the exploration pool
dailyOps.pixelNotConnectedHint: Web Pixel funnel data is unavailable, so sessions and conversion fields are temporarily unavailable. Check SLS configuration and Pixel event ingestion.
dailyOps.layerLegendIntro: Every analysis is split into three layers: Revenue → Profit → Investment (ROI). The tags below mark where each metric comes from so you can judge its reliability.
dailyOps.layerRevenueDesc: How much revenue the channel drives
dailyOps.layerInvestmentDesc: Return on investment — is it actually profitable
dailyOps.sourceRealTip: From synced Shopify orders / refunds / customers
dailyOps.sourceEstimatedTip: Estimated via default margin / payment fee / segment rules; adjustable in cost assumptions below
dailyOps.sourcePendingTip: Data source not connected yet (e.g. ad spend); placeholder until connected
dailyOps.investmentSubtitle: Once connected, Business ROI, ROAS, CPA, LTV:CAC and S–D grades are computed per channel automatically
dailyOps.customerSubtitle: {{total}} paying customers · rule-based segments + dynamic LTV + value score (0-100)
dailyOps.channelSubtitle: Revenue is real attribution (last-click); profit is estimated. {{share}}% of revenue attributable to a specific channel
dailyOps.noChannelData: No orders in the last 30 days, channel data unavailable
dailyOps.costSubtitle: Used for contribution profit estimates; saving recalculates customer value and channel profit
dailyOps.costDefaultHint: Currently using system defaults (60% margin / 2.9%+0.3 fees). Configure actual values to improve profit confidence.
dailyOps.pageSubtitle: Organize daily work around today’s outcomes, key operating checkpoints, and actionable tasks, then hand the task context to AI for execution.
dailyOps.valueSubtitle: Place channel performance, customer value, and investment placeholders inside one operating framework so the lower half feels like the same workspace.

detailSubtitle.performance: Review full metrics, comparisons, and review deltas without overloading the overview page.
detailSubtitle.risk: Read risk environments, anomaly evidence, and diagnosis reasoning in a dedicated detail view.
detailSubtitle.value: Inspect customer value, channel performance, and cost assumptions without stacking estimate-heavy modules on the overview.
detailSubtitle.task: Review the task goal, impact metric, suggested actions, and current execution status.

dailyOps.summarySubtitle: Keep only the key operating summaries on the overview and merge snapshot comparisons into the same summary area.
dailyOps.summaryInsightHint: Insights now live inside the operating-checkpoint module.
dailyOps.monitoringSubtitle: Switch across fixed business checkpoints horizontally and inspect current status, related insights, and task entry points in one module.
dailyOps.monitoringEmpty: No operating-checkpoint data is available yet.
dailyOps.monitoringInsightsEmpty: There are no priority insights for this checkpoint right now.
dailyOps.monitoringDetailHint: Open the current checkpoint detail to inspect object-level anomalies, evidence, and related tasks.
dailyOps.riskDetailHint: Risk environments, diagnosis evidence, and raw health items now live in the detail view.
dailyOps.summaryCostHint: Open cost assumptions and value-layer details
dailyOps.allInsightsDetailHint: The raw health diagnosis has been moved out of this task list to reduce information pressure.
dailyOps.valueUnavailable: No value-layer data is available yet.
dailyOps.detailRiskCritical: Number of risk environments that need immediate follow-up.
dailyOps.detailRiskInsights: Number of active anomaly insights available for validation.
dailyOps.detailRiskHealth: Number of raw health checks currently monitored.
dailyOps.detailValueChannels: Number of channels currently included in the value layer.
dailyOps.detailValueCost: Current default gross-margin assumption. Adjust it in cost settings if needed.
dailyOps.detailRelatedObjectsSubtitle: Break the current risk down into concrete orders, shipments, and SKUs.
dailyOps.detailRelatedObjectsEmpty: No object-level detail is available for this environment yet.
dailyOps.detailRelatedObjectsHint: This environment is still backed by placeholder or summary-level logic. Object-level data can be connected later.
dailyOps.detailRiskSelectEnvironment: Select a risk environment above to inspect affected objects, related insights, and related tasks.
dailyOps.detailRiskSelectInsight: Select an insight above to inspect affected objects, related environments, and related tasks.
dailyOps.detailInsightObjectsHint: This insight is not mapped to order-level or SKU-level objects yet. Use its evidence and linked environments for investigation first.
dailyOps.reviewUnavailable: No review data is available yet.
dailyOps.keyMetricsSubtitle: Focus on {{shop}}’s short-term performance, long-term recovery signals, and the most important comparisons for today.
dailyOps.metricTrafficHint: Decide first whether traffic is expanding or shrinking before drilling into channels.
dailyOps.metricAovHint: AOV determines revenue efficiency under the same traffic level and should be read with pricing or bundle changes.
dailyOps.metricConversionHint: When conversion drops, inspect product pages, the payment path, and landing-page experience first.
dailyOps.metricCostHint: Refunds and service issues directly erode profit and are key cost inputs for short-term ROI.
dailyOps.metricShortRoiHintLine1: Use sales trend as the first signal for today’s short-term return pressure.
dailyOps.metricShortRoiHintLine2: Combine it with refunds, fulfillment, and traffic changes to decide whether to stop losses now.
dailyOps.metricLongRoiHintLine1: Long-term return should be read with customer value, repeat purchase, and high-value customer share.
dailyOps.metricLongRoiHintLine2: If the customer value layer is not connected yet, keep this section as a placeholder.
dailyOps.riskEnvironmentSubtitle: Beyond result metrics, monitor merchandising, inventory, logistics, payment, risk control, and after-sales environments.
dailyOps.riskMetricNewArrivalPending: Pending: listing failure rate, content completeness, zero-exposure rate after launch
dailyOps.riskSummaryNewArrivals: Once launch planning data is connected, detect failed listings, incomplete content, and weak first-wave exposure automatically.
dailyOps.riskSummaryInventoryFallback: Prioritize sellable days and replenishment rhythm for high-velocity SKUs before stockouts hit revenue.
dailyOps.riskSummaryFulfillmentFallback: Fulfillment and logistics failures hit customer experience first, then refunds and support load.
dailyOps.riskMetricPaymentPending: Pending: payment failure rate, checkout bounce rate, payment-method anomaly share
dailyOps.riskSummaryPayments: Payment failures usually hurt conversion before they appear clearly in revenue, so this deserves a dedicated risk layer.
dailyOps.riskMetricRiskControlPending: Pending: false-positive rate, chargeback rate, high-risk order share
dailyOps.riskSummaryRiskControl: Risk control must block bad orders without killing real conversion, so it should be monitored separately.
dailyOps.riskSummaryRefundFallback: Refunds often combine merchandise, logistics, and service issues, so root causes need to be separated.
dailyOps.riskSummaryConversionFallback: When conversion is abnormal, inspect the product page, payment path, and critical landing-page experience first.
dailyOps.riskSummaryConversionPending: Without Pixel data, keep this as a placeholder card until real traffic and conversion risk signals are connected.
dailyOps.riskMetricRoiPending: Pending ad spend and fixed-cost data to complete Business ROI
dailyOps.riskSummaryRoi: Use {{channel}}’s contribution profit and customer quality as the first read on near-term recovery quality.
dailyOps.riskSummaryRoiPending: Channel ROI is still estimate-based; after ad spend is connected, you can judge whether the business is truly profitable.
dailyOps.dataInsightsSubtitle: Turn today’s anomalies into verifiable directions and the next questions to answer.
dailyOps.dataInsightsEmpty: No high-priority anomalies to follow up today.
dailyOps.taskWorkbenchSubtitle: Organize today’s actions by status and priority, with impact metrics, expected upside, and an AI execution entry on every task.
dailyOps.allInsightsSubtitle: Review the full task pool as one list and filter by status, priority level, or expected effect.
dailyOps.filterEmpty: No insights match the current filters.
dailyOps.taskDetailEmpty: The task could not be found. Go back to the overview and select it again.
dailyOps.healthSubtitle: Keep the full diagnosis evidence and reasoning available for traceability.
dailyOps.taskObjectiveFulfillment: Resolve fulfillment backlog and logistics anomalies before customer experience worsens further.
dailyOps.taskMetricFulfillment: Fulfillment timeliness, logistics anomaly rate, refund rate
dailyOps.taskLiftFulfillment: Expected to reduce abnormal orders by 10%–20% and limit after-sales spillover.
dailyOps.taskRoiFulfillment: A stop-loss move that protects near-term profit and future repeat purchase experience.
dailyOps.taskObjectiveRefund: Review the refund spike and correct merchandise, logistics, or service strategy.
dailyOps.taskMetricRefund: Refund rate, bad-review risk, repeat purchase rate
dailyOps.taskLiftRefund: If the root cause is fixed, refund risk can drop 5%–10% over 1–2 weeks.
dailyOps.taskRoiRefund: Improves profit and customer quality by reducing refunds and compensation costs.
dailyOps.taskObjectiveInventory: Control stockout loss with replenishment, limited selling, or substitute-SKU plans.
dailyOps.taskMetricInventory: Sellable days, stockout rate, GMV protected
dailyOps.taskLiftInventory: Expected to preserve the next 7 days of sales and reduce stockout-driven revenue loss.
dailyOps.taskRoiInventory: Primarily protects revenue while helping both short-term ROI and supply stability.
dailyOps.taskObjectiveTraffic: Separate traffic from conversion issues first, then decide whether to optimize channel, product page, or on-site path.
dailyOps.taskMetricTraffic: Sessions, conversion rate, sales, channel efficiency
dailyOps.taskLiftTraffic: Expected to improve key funnel metrics by 3%–8%.
dailyOps.taskRoiTraffic: If diagnosed correctly, this can improve both short-term conversion and mid-term growth efficiency.
dailyOps.taskNoSuggestedActions: No suggested actions yet. Add context from the diagnosis details.
dailyOps.taskPromptInstruction: Based on the task context above, propose an execution plan first, then break it into concrete steps with priorities and any missing data needed.

orderMonitor.pageIntro: Real-time order monitoring powered by synced Shopify data. Metrics cover the last 30 days.
orderMonitor.emptyState: No order data synced yet. Orders sync automatically when customers place them. To import historical data, run a backfill.
orderMonitor.diagOrderHealthy: Order cancel rate is within a healthy range.
orderMonitor.diagOrderWatch: Cancel rate is elevated. Review order cancellation reasons.
orderMonitor.diagFulfillmentRisk: Fulfillment rate is low. Review your fulfillment workflow.
orderMonitor.diagRefundRisk: Refund rate is high. Check product quality and descriptions.
orderMonitor.diagInventoryRisk: Inventory risk detected. Replenish out-of-stock SKUs promptly.
orderMonitor.diagNoData: No order data available yet. Install the app and let orders sync, or run a backfill.
orderMonitor.fallbackDiagCheck: Check that the app has read_orders and read_inventory permissions.
orderMonitor.fulfillmentSlaSubtitle: Average order-to-ship time {{hours}}h. Overdue {{overdue}}, unfulfilled alerts {{unfulfilled}}, carrier issues {{carrier}}.
orderMonitor.emptyRefundSku: No refunded SKU details in this period.
orderMonitor.emptyShippingRefund: No shipping refunds in this period.
orderMonitor.suggestionRefundSpike: Refund rate is rising period-over-period. Review recent campaigns, product pages, and delivery promises.
orderMonitor.suggestionTopRefundSku: Prioritize Top refunded SKUs for description, image, sizing, and quality checks.
orderMonitor.suggestionRefundOrders: Review abnormal refund orders and tag repeated reasons for after-sales follow-up.
orderMonitor.suggestionRefundHealthy: Refund indicators are stable. Keep monitoring reasons at SKU level.

translation.pageIntro: Create JSON Runtime translation jobs and monitor progress. Choose target locale and resource types, then submit. Use the panel on the right for task list and runtime status.
translation.validationResourceTypes: Please select at least one resource type
translation.createFailedRetry: Failed to create task. Please try again later.
translation.fallbackLocalesHint: Using built-in locale list. Grant read_locales scope and reinstall app to sync enabled Shopify locales.
translation.validationSameLocale: Target locale cannot be the same as source locale
translation.selectTargetLocale: No target languages available. Enable more locales in Shopify admin.

productSelector.empty: No matching products found, try another keyword

translationRuntime.validationTargetExample: Please enter target locale, e.g. fr, ja, en
translationRuntime.validationTargetRequired: Select at least one target language
translationRuntime.validationModule: Please select at least one translation module
translationRuntime.createTaskDesc: This writes a JSON Runtime task into Cosmos, and AgentTask handles execution. Confirm locale and modules before submitting.
translationRuntime.openTaskPage: Open translation task page to view progress
translationRuntime.loadFailedRetry: Load failed, please try again later
translationRuntime.fileEmptyOrNoBlobContent: (File is empty or Blob has no content yet)
translationRuntime.selectTaskHint: Select a task from the list above
translationRuntime.previewTruncatedDownloadHint: Preview is truncated; download full content from storage.
translationRuntime.serviceErrorRetry: Network or service error, please try again later
translationRuntime.listLoadFailedRetry: Failed to load task list, please try again later
translationRuntime.noPercentReason: Unable to compute percentage: neither Redis meta nor Cosmos metrics has entry totals (totalCountThisBlob / totalCount), and chunk totals (runtimeChunksTotal) are also missing.
translationRuntime.panelIntro: Task list comes from Cosmos in this app (same table as creation), and refreshes quietly every {{listSec}}s when visible. Task details are forwarded to Java AgentTask by default (translate/v3/jsonRuntimeTaskDetail); if JSON_RUNTIME_TASK_DETAIL_SOURCE=local is set, Spark aggregates Cosmos/Redis/Blob locally. Auto-refresh starts after selecting a task (about every {{detailSec}}s) with countdown; hidden pages pause countdown and requests.
translationRuntime.currentShopTasksHeading: JSON Runtime tasks for current shop
translationRuntime.noTaskRecords: No tasks found in Cosmos (translation_jobs) for this shop with taskType=spark (or legacy json-runtime).
translationRuntime.selectTaskToView: Select a task above to view runtime progress and Blob info.
translationRuntime.noDataEmptyResponse: No data (request succeeded but response is empty).
translationRuntime.initFetchExplain: This section tracks initial Shopify fetching: accumulated count increases per module; 'Initial total count' is sum of translatable rows captured by modules (subject to module limits). Its denominator differs from below entry progress, which uses runtime parsed translatable paths from merged JSON (including nested expansion), usually larger. It auto-refreshes with details every {{sec}}s.
translationRuntime.initTotalCountLabel: Initial total count (!= runtime path count)
translationRuntime.failuresHeading: Failure details (Redis failMap · Report · Blob chunks/failed.json)
translationRuntime.largeReportBlobHint: Current report Blob is large (>512KB), failures are not inlined. Download from Report Blob below or enable preview to view full JSON.
translationRuntime.failedJsonLargeHint: chunks/failed.json is larger than 512KB and not returned inline; open tasks/.../chunks/failed.json under Blob input directory.
translationRuntime.noFailureDetailHint: No failure details. If task failed and Blob exists, refresh details and deploy backend version that includes chunks/failed.json extra fields.
translationRuntime.expandFailedJsonAll: Expand full Blob chunks/failed.json entries ({{count}} items with source text)
translationRuntime.reportBlobDesc: Generated by LLM after translation is completed. Stored with chunk files under chunks/. Click below to fetch Blob preview and render in modal.
translationRuntime.qualityBlobDesc: Samples successful source/translation paths and asks LLM to score overall quality and provide poor examples (independent from translation-report.md).
translationRuntime.previewServerTruncatedHint: Preview is truncated by server-side size limit; download full Blob from storage console.
translationRuntime.cosmosStatusSavePending: Translation complete, writing back to Shopify

qualityScore.emptyResult: Select a product and click Score quality.
qualityScore.levelGood: Good — product page quality is strong

productImproveStage1.subtitle: Start on the configuration page, then review and apply results in the task list.
productImproveStage1.configHint: Configure the task first, then start it. Execution status, review, and result application are all in the task list.
productImproveStage1.taskListSubtitle: Running tasks, tasks pending review, applied results, and scoring results are centrally tracked here.
productImproveStage1.taskEmpty: No tasks yet. Start a generation or scoring task in the "Configuration" tab first.
productImproveStage1.estimateDesc: Confirm scope, estimated duration, and credit cost before generation starts.
productImproveStage1.stage1BatchHint: Stage 1 focuses on individual task structure. Batch execution will be added in a later stage.
productImproveStage1.configSurfaceSubtitle: Select a product and target language, then create a task. The pre-estimate will be shown in the confirmation dialog.
productImproveStage1.targetLanguageHint: Language controls tone and output. After creating a task, you can continue review in the task list.
productImproveStage1.confirmFlowHint: When creating a task, a confirmation dialog appears showing scope, estimated duration, and credits before submission.
productImproveStage1.toastSelectProduct: Please select a product first or enter a product ID
productImproveStage1.toastTaskCreated: Text generation task created. Track progress in the task list.
productImproveStage1.confirmDialogDesc: You will be redirected to the task list to track progress, review results, and apply changes to Shopify.
productImproveStage1.confirmDialogFootnote: Creating a task does not write anything to Shopify directly. Review results on the task page before applying.
productImproveStage1.historyTasksHint: History contains tasks created more than 24 hours ago.
productImproveStage1.currentTasksEmpty: No tasks yet. Create a generation task in the Configuration tab first.
productImproveStage1.historyTasksEmpty: No history tasks older than 24 hours yet.
productImproveStage1.cardPrimaryCreditInsufficient: Progress {{progressPercent}}%. Task paused due to insufficient credits.
productImproveStage1.cardPrimaryPendingReview: Progress 100%. Task completed, awaiting manual review.
productImproveStage1.cardPrimaryScored: Review completed. The approved result can now be applied.
productImproveStage1.cardPrimaryApplied: Progress 100%. The approved result has been successfully applied.
productImproveStage1.cardPrimaryCancelled: Task was cancelled before the remaining steps could continue.
productImproveStage1.cardSecondaryCreditInsufficient: Elapsed time: {{elapsedLabel}}. {{usedCredits}} credits used so far, approximately {{estimatedCredits}} more needed.
productImproveStage1.cardSecondaryCompleted: Elapsed time: {{elapsedLabel}}. This task consumed {{usedCredits}} credits.
productImproveStage1.cardSecondaryFailed: Task interrupted at item {{completedCount}}/{{itemCount}}. Open details to continue.
productImproveStage1.detailSummaryApplied: Review and application completed. You can view the result and return to the task list.
productImproveStage1.detailSummaryReview: Compare the original content on the left and refine drafts record by record on the right until you select the final version to apply.
productImproveStage1.applyValidationCompleteTitleDescription: Please complete the review and confirm both title and description first.
productImproveStage1.recordStatusApplied: This version has been confirmed as the final applied version
productImproveStage1.applyNetworkError: A network error occurred while applying the result.
productImproveStage1.refineRecordMissing: Could not find the result record to continue refining.
productImproveStage1.refineDraftMissing: Please complete the title and description of the current draft first.

productImproveStage1.refineNetworkError: A network error occurred during AI refinement.
productImproveStage1.reviewSectionDescription: Compare original content on the left and edit the selected result version on the right. Scoring and AI refinement are in the record dialog.
productImproveStage1.resultRecordsDescription: Each scoring round and AI refinement is saved as a record. New refined versions continue to accumulate here.
productImproveStage1.feedbackDialogDescription: Score and add notes to the current result version, then send this feedback to the AI to generate a new record.
productImproveStage1.feedbackNotePlaceholder: Optional: Add review notes about accuracy, brand tone, or readability.
productImproveStage1.feedbackOptimizationPlaceholder: Example: Keep the structure of the first paragraph, make the tone more premium, and add usage scenarios.
productImproveStage1.saveFeedbackAndGenerate: Save Feedback and Generate New Version
productImproveStage1.serverInvalidJson: Request body is not valid JSON
productImproveStage1.serverProductNotFound: Product not found or access denied
productImproveStage1.asyncContextLoaded: Product title, description and other information loaded
productImproveStage1.asyncGeneratingTitleDraft: Generating a new title draft with natural keyword placement
productImproveStage1.asyncGeneratingDescriptionDraft: Writing out the description and preparing the summary
productImproveStage1.asyncModelInvocationFinalMessage: AI generation failed. Check task details and try again.
productImproveStage1.asyncOutputParseFinalMessage: Could not process the generated result. Please try again.
